name: Code Review Bot
summary: Analyze GitHub pull requests, summarize risk, and draft a reviewer checklist using the gh CLI.

name: Job Tracker
summary: Track job applications, contacts, deadlines, and follow-up reminders in a local SQLite database.

name: Expense Snap
summary: Capture receipt details, categorize spending, and generate monthly reports from a local SQLite ledger.

name: Smart Scheduler
summary: Coordinate meeting requests, proposed time slots, confirmations, and ICS exports from a local scheduling ledger.
